calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John H. Dresslar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Daniel Erman, Sales Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Mortgage Pointers.com, Inc., a California Corporation.
Dismissal was entered as to defendant Akash Kapoor, a/k/a Jagdeep Kapoor on November 12, 2008.
Default was entered against defendant Mortgage Pointers.com, Inc., a California Corporation on November 26, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 26, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mortgage Pointers.com, Inc., a California Corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $53,050.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,353.98.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $392.50, for a judgment in the amount of $59,796.48.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
